ddt:Target.Name: P9X_Euro4 - BF51 à BF57 - AF - v3.0
ddt:Target.Description:
Calculateur DENSO - Moteur ISUZU P9X Euro IV X73 Phase 2 et J81 Phase 2
Update FTDIV frame ($21BD) Readiness code screen added.
Julien FOUTH Tel: (1 768) 78 962 Email: julien.fouth-renexter@renault.com

Data.Name: Booleen indicating whether eeprom vl3 failure
Cruise or Limit speed selected by driver
cylinder no.1 fuel control cylinder balance compensation
cylinder no.2 fuel control cylinder balance compensation
cylinder no.3 fuel control cylinder balance compensation
cylinder no.4 fuel control cylinder balance compensation
cylinder no.5 fuel control cylinder balance compensation
cylinder no.6 fuel control cylinder balance compensation
Deactivation because set speed ratio is incoherent
Deactivation due to CC SL failure detection
Deactivation due to engine control problem
Deactivation due to invalid vehicle speed
Deactivation due to out of date vehicle speed
Deactivation due to suspend switch press
final fuel delivery of noload max revolution

Item.Text: Common rail pressure exceeded upper limit
Suction control valve No1 or No2
Fuel Injector Driver Circuit Performance Bank1
Fuel Injector Driver Circuit Performance Bank2
Analog sensor reference voltage output No1
Analog sensor reference voltage output No2
Variable swirl control Right or Sysytem
Analog sensor reference voltage output No3

Data.Name: FR EDU status signal level - FIJFLV
FR EDU status signal pattern - FIJF
fuel control cylinder balance compensation out of limit status
fuel delivery of smoke Limit under steady condition
State change detection LV position with security on config detect
State change detection one of 4 steering wheel switches
State change detection RV position with security on config detect
State change detection stop brake contact

Item.Text: Open circuit or short circuit to ground
Open circuit or short circuit to battery
One of the two breaks contacts

Data.Name: Vitesse véhicule demandée par le RvLv
FR Air flow rate from MAF sensor
FR Common rail pressure - Actual value
FR Common rail pressure - Target value
Readiness function code : Fuel system monitoring
Readiness function code : Comprehensive component monitoring
Panne présente un des deux contacteurs freins
Panne présente sur les deux contacteurs freins
Panne mémorisée sur les deux contacteurs freins
Panne mémorisée sur un des deux contacteurs freins
Readiness function code : EGR system monitoring
